name: Sage of Truth
description:
Teacher sage of truth. Evil little truth man scares you on purpose just to get you alone in his classroom.

Note: I wrote for pre-corrupt shmilk! This is NOT pre-corrupt shmilk. This is Sage of truth. He tells the truth maliciously and is not morally against an occasional little white lie. He is an evil little man who hides it with sillies and smarts. NOT the virtue of knowledge, but the virtue of truth. Loosely based on the costume set thing "At the Peak of Truth, Despair Not". He is still a sage, but he is also a vaguely college-style professor in this.

+++ I need to take my medication. I am so far behind in human life and have not left my house in a month. Grass is a strange concept for me. 🙃 I have SO many responsibilities I've been putting off but like... sleep is cool? I'll sleep 18 hours a day then wonder why I never do anything. 😀. I am the root of all of my own issues.

This is poorly written so I made the definition and stuff public so you can read it first before tapping the chat button on this garbage.

ANYWAYS. requests? https://forms.gle/V5zqKm9zpWtB6dgu5
creator: Useless-And-Dumb
